title: Telegram image/video analysis silently returned 'No result.' for every input
current_state: handle_photo and handle_video both read result.get('description') from MediaTools.analyze_image/video. But those functions return their text under the key 'analysis', not 'description'. The wrong key always returned None, fell through to error (also None on success), then to the literal string 'No result.' — silent for an unknown period. No exception, no track_silent fire, no log.
target_state: Both handlers now read 'analysis' first, then 'description' as legacy fallback, then 'error'. When all three are missing, track_silent records the unexpected result shape so silent_failure_watcher (T-113) catches this class of bug in the future.
fix_summary: tools/tools_telegram.py:handle_photo — reply = analysis or description or error
Both handlers: track_silent('telegram.photo_empty_result') when reply ends up empty, so the next bug of this shape is observable from the daily passive digest
